mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_TERMS WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY TERMS_IDX ASC

SELECT TERMS_IDX, TERMS_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENTS, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE, (SELECT A.CODE_NAME FROM CMS_CODE A WHERE A.GROUP_ID = 'C0015' AND A.CODE_ID = CMS_TERMS.TERMS_TYPE) AS TERMS_TYPE_NAME FROM CMS_TERMS WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TERMS_IDX = #{terms_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(terms_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_TERMS
INSERT INTO CMS_TERMS ( TERMS_IDX, TERMS_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENTS, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE ) VALUES ( #{terms_idx}, #{terms_type}, #{title}, #{contents}, #{use_yn}, 'N', #{add_id}, SYSDATE, #{add_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_TERMS SET TERMS_TYPE = #{terms_type}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, MODIFY_ID = #{add_id}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE TERMS_IDX = #{terms_idx}
UPDATE CMS_TERMS SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE TERMS_IDX = #{terms_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT TERMS_IDX, TERMS_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENTS, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_ID, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE, (SELECT A.CODE_NAME FROM CMS_CODE A WHERE A.GROUP_ID = 'C0015' AND A.CODE_ID = CMS_TERMS.TERMS_TYPE) AS TERMS_TYPE_NAME FROM CMS_TERMS WHERE TERMS_IDX IN (SELECT TERMS_IDX FROM CMS_MODULE_TERMS WHERE MODULE_IDX = #{module_idx}) AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY TERMS_IDX

SELECT TERMS_IDX, TERMS_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENTS, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_ID, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE, (SELECT A.CODE_NAME FROM CMS_CODE A WHERE A.GROUP_ID = 'C0015' AND A.CODE_ID = CMS_TERMS.TERMS_TYPE) AS TERMS_TYPE_NAME FROM CMS_TERMS WHERE TERMS_IDX NOT IN (SELECT TERMS_IDX FROM CMS_MODULE_TERMS WHERE MODULE_IDX = #{module_idx}) AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
